---
title: List of ONC publications
---

* https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10754545/authors#authors
* https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0003682X19301616
* https://pubs.aip.org/asa/jasa/article/141/5_Supplement/3863/713799/Passive-acoustic-localization-of-fish-using-a
* https://pubs.aip.org/asa/jel/article/4/1/016001/2932985/Performance-of-three-hydrophone-flow-shields-in-a
* https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10754545
* https://pubs.aip.org/asa/jasa/article/134/5_Supplement/3973/708860/Remote-performance-assessment-of-cabled
* https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/stamp/stamp.jsp?tp=&arnumber=9976955&tag=1


Scientific Output: https://internal.oceannetworks.ca/spaces/OS/pages/249300119/Scientific+Output
